title: CenterPoint (CNP) Gets Nod to Build Natural Gas Turbines
text: CenterPoint Energy (CNP) announces that its subsidiary, CenterPoint Energy Indiana South, has received a nod from IURC to commence the construction of two natural gas combustion turbines.

title: CenterPoint Energy, Inc. to Host Webcast of Second Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call
CenterPoint's (CNP) Green Hydrogen Project Starts Operation
text: CenterPoint's (CNP) Minnesota-based green hydrogen project is powered by renewable electricity and can produce up to 60 Dekatherms of hydrogen gas per day.

title: CenterPoint (CNP) Up 2.3% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
text: CenterPoint (CNP) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?
